title: Tearful Adieu: Harish Rana’s Family Donates His Organs, Hopes He Lives On In Others
description: A bench of Justices JB Pardiwala and KV Vishwanathan allowed the withdrawal of clinically assisted nutrition and hydration (CANH) for Harish Rana, who has remained in a vegetative state since suffering an accidental fall from a building in 2013.
